g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is station_risk_score derived from Tamil Nadu rainfall history?')
sendPrompt('What IMD data feeds the intensity-duration calculation?')
sendPrompt('What worker data is verified via the Swiggy or Zomato API?')
sendPrompt('Why does 2-month work history prevent fraudulent enrollment timing?')
sendPrompt('Prove mathematically that T+7 delay eliminates timing fraud')
sendPrompt('How does basis risk affect workers who are far from the nearest IMD station?')
sendPrompt('Show full payout trigger examples with I×D ≥ 50')
sendPrompt('Show partial payout trigger examples with 30 ≤ I×D < 50')
sendPrompt('What is the economic reasoning for I×D < 30 triggering no payout?')
sendPrompt('Justify λ_F_max=0.20 and λ_P_max=0.30 from Chennai IMD data')
sendPrompt('Prove w = 0.70 is a constant independent of s and beta')
sendPrompt('Show the four seasonal beta values and their weighted average')
sendPrompt('Derive the full expected payout formula step by step')
sendPrompt('Show the full premium formula with loading decomposition')
sendPrompt('How is a parametric payout triggered and delivered automatically?')
sendPrompt('How is the reserve fund sized and managed seasonally?')
sendPrompt('At what aggregate loss does the reinsurance XL treaty activate?')
